name: aiads
description: AIAds 仓库聚合脚本（子项目在 src/backend、src/frontend、tests）

scripts.check:backend: npm --prefix src/backend run typecheck && npm --prefix src/backend run lint && npm --prefix src/backend test
scripts.check:frontend: npm --prefix src/frontend run lint && npm --prefix src/frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix src/frontend run test:run
scripts.check:lint: npm --prefix src/backend run lint && npm --prefix src/frontend run lint
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
